markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on Tavrn's evolving marketing strategy and future collaboration.](https://fathom.video/share/ivhxFAZ7Q61WSZEsyT1JbNXYRjhyhxzG?tab=summary&timestamp=639.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Strategic Pivot:** Tavrn is pivoting to own the Personal Injury (PI) vertical, moving from a broad "master of none" message to a focused, authoritative position to better compete with rivals like EvenUp.](https://fathom.video/share/ivhxFAZ7Q61WSZEsyT1JbNXYRjhyhxzG?tab=summary&timestamp=760.0)
  - [**Performance & Pricing:** Organic traffic is surging (150→550 weekly sessions). A record retrieval price test ($20 vs. $40) is underway on Meta ads, with the $20 ad kept active as a "golden goose" for lead volume.](https://fathom.video/share/ivhxFAZ7Q61WSZEsyT1JbNXYRjhyhxzG?tab=summary&timestamp=1021.0)
  - [**Future Collaboration:** GrowthX proposed new content plays (e.g., demand letter templates, PI glossary) to drive conversions and build domain authority, evolving the partnership beyond pure traffic generation.](https://fathom.video/share/ivhxFAZ7Q61WSZEsyT1JbNXYRjhyhxzG?tab=summary&timestamp=277.0)
  - [**New Tool:** GrowthX's new in-house platform, "CheckThat," will launch in early Feb to track Tavrn's visibility and citations in LLM search results, enabling a strategic push for AI-driven traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/ivhxFAZ7Q61WSZEsyT1JbNXYRjhyhxzG?tab=summary&timestamp=1203.0)

## Topics

### Tavrn's Evolving Strategy

  - [**Primary Goal:** "Catch up" to competitors in content and positioning.](https://fathom.video/share/ivhxFAZ7Q61WSZEsyT1JbNXYRjhyhxzG?tab=summary&timestamp=760.0)
  - [**Strategic Pivot:** Focus exclusively on the Personal Injury (PI) vertical.](https://fathom.video/share/ivhxFAZ7Q61WSZEsyT1JbNXYRjhyhxzG?tab=summary&timestamp=760.0)
      - [**Rationale:** The current broad messaging is ineffective; PI represents 100+ customers vs. \~3 in other areas.](https://fathom.video/share/ivhxFAZ7Q61WSZEsyT1JbNXYRjhyhxzG?tab=summary&timestamp=760.0)
      - [**Action:** Website copy is being updated to reflect this focus.](https://fathom.video/share/ivhxFAZ7Q61WSZEsyT1JbNXYRjhyhxzG?tab=summary&timestamp=760.0)
  - [**Product Differentiators:**](https://fathom.video/share/ivhxFAZ7Q61WSZEsyT1JbNXYRjhyhxzG?tab=summary&timestamp=957.0)
      - [**Record Retrieval:** A key differentiator, though dependent on external provider cooperation.](https://fathom.video/share/ivhxFAZ7Q61WSZEsyT1JbNXYRjhyhxzG?tab=summary&timestamp=927.0)
      - [**Demand Letters:** Positioned as superior to generic AI outputs, matching law firm brands.](https://fathom.video/share/ivhxFAZ7Q61WSZEsyT1JbNXYRjhyhxzG?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
      - [**Chronologies:** A strong product, but differentiation is harder to communicate.](https://fathom.video/share/ivhxFAZ7Q61WSZEsyT1JbNXYRjhyhxzG?tab=summary&timestamp=986.0)
  - [**Confidential Product:** A "Plaid for healthcare" API gateway is in development to solve record retrieval friction. This is a strategic "moat play" and will remain confidential until providers are onboarded.](https://fathom.video/share/ivhxFAZ7Q61WSZEsyT1JbNXYRjhyhxzG?tab=summary&timestamp=927.0)

### Marketing & Growth Performance

  - [**Organic Traffic:** Surging, up from 150 to 550 weekly sessions.](https://fathom.video/share/ivhxFAZ7Q61WSZEsyT1JbNXYRjhyhxzG?tab=summary&timestamp=1621.0)
  - [**Paid Ads (Meta):**](https://fathom.video/share/ivhxFAZ7Q61WSZEsyT1JbNXYRjhyhxzG?tab=summary&timestamp=685.0)
      - [**Challenge:** Audiences are burning out, limiting budget spend and lowering lead quality.](https://fathom.video/share/ivhxFAZ7Q61WSZEsyT1JbNXYRjhyhxzG?tab=summary&timestamp=685.0)
      - [**Action:** Exploring new channels (e.g., Google) to diversify away from Meta.](https://fathom.video/share/ivhxFAZ7Q61WSZEsyT1JbNXYRjhyhxzG?tab=summary&timestamp=1085.0)
  - [**Record Retrieval Price Test:**](https://fathom.video/share/ivhxFAZ7Q61WSZEsyT1JbNXYRjhyhxzG?tab=summary&timestamp=1021.0)
      - [**Context:** Price increased from $20 to $40.](https://fathom.video/share/ivhxFAZ7Q61WSZEsyT1JbNXYRjhyhxzG?tab=summary&timestamp=1021.0)
      - [**Action:** A/B testing $20 vs. $40 ads. The $20 ad remains active to protect lead volume.](https://fathom.video/share/ivhxFAZ7Q61WSZEsyT1JbNXYRjhyhxzG?tab=summary&timestamp=1021.0)
      - [**Sales Enablement:** HubSpot integration will inform sales reps of the price a lead saw before a meeting.](https://fathom.video/share/ivhxFAZ7Q61WSZEsyT1JbNXYRjhyhxzG?tab=summary&timestamp=1049.0)

### Future Content & Conversion Ideas

  - [**Demand Letter Templates:** Offer as a gated asset to capture qualified leads.](https://fathom.video/share/ivhxFAZ7Q61WSZEsyT1JbNXYRjhyhxzG?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [**PI Glossary/Question Center:** Build domain authority by becoming the definitive source for PI terms, optimized for LLM queries.](https://fathom.video/share/ivhxFAZ7Q61WSZEsyT1JbNXYRjhyhxzG?tab=summary&timestamp=349.0)
  - [**Provider Directory:** A gated asset of provider contact info for record retrieval.](https://fathom.video/share/ivhxFAZ7Q61WSZEsyT1JbNXYRjhyhxzG?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
      - [**Pro:** High-value lead magnet.](https://fathom.video/share/ivhxFAZ7Q61WSZEsyT1JbNXYRjhyhxzG?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
      - [**Con:** Requires significant, ongoing effort to maintain accuracy.](https://fathom.video/share/ivhxFAZ7Q61WSZEsyT1JbNXYRjhyhxzG?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)

### New Tool: CheckThat

  - [**Purpose:** An in-house GrowthX platform to track LLM visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/ivhxFAZ7Q61WSZEsyT1JbNXYRjhyhxzG?tab=summary&timestamp=1240.0)
  - [**Metrics Tracked:**](https://fathom.video/share/ivhxFAZ7Q61WSZEsyT1JbNXYRjhyhxzG?tab=summary&timestamp=1514.0)
      - [**Presence:** Tavrn being recommended as a top tool.](https://fathom.video/share/ivhxFAZ7Q61WSZEsyT1JbNXYRjhyhxzG?tab=summary&timestamp=1545.0)
      - [**Citations:** LLMs generating responses from Tavrn's content.](https://fathom.video/share/ivhxFAZ7Q61WSZEsyT1JbNXYRjhyhxzG?tab=summary&timestamp=1517.0)
  - [**Rollout:** Official launch in the first week of February.](https://fathom.video/share/ivhxFAZ7Q61WSZEsyT1JbNXYRjhyhxzG?tab=summary&timestamp=1203.0)
  - [**Next Step:** Megan will provide input on strategic prompts to track.](https://fathom.video/share/ivhxFAZ7Q61WSZEsyT1JbNXYRjhyhxzG?tab=summary&timestamp=1573.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Matt:**](https://fathom.video/share/ivhxFAZ7Q61WSZEsyT1JbNXYRjhyhxzG?tab=summary&timestamp=1608.0)
      - [Share the performance dashboard link with Megan.](https://fathom.video/share/ivhxFAZ7Q61WSZEsyT1JbNXYRjhyhxzG?tab=summary&timestamp=1643.0)
      - [Provide a full CheckThat walkthrough in the next sync.](https://fathom.video/share/ivhxFAZ7Q61WSZEsyT1JbNXYRjhyhxzG?tab=summary&timestamp=1557.0)
  - [**Megan:**](https://fathom.video/share/ivhxFAZ7Q61WSZEsyT1JbNXYRjhyhxzG?tab=summary&timestamp=1604.0)
      - [Review the performance dashboard.](https://fathom.video/share/ivhxFAZ7Q61WSZEsyT1JbNXYRjhyhxzG?tab=summary&timestamp=1643.0)
      - [Prepare input on strategic LLM prompts for CheckThat.](https://fathom.video/share/ivhxFAZ7Q61WSZEsyT1JbNXYRjhyhxzG?tab=summary&timestamp=1573.0)
